parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS(
  SELECT 1 FROM emails
  WHERE gmail_message_id = '{{ $json.gmail_message_id || $json.id }}'
) AS already_processed
SELECT value FROM static_context WHERE key = 'ai.thresholds'

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen2.5:7b', system: "You are an email classification system for Jo, a business owner.
Jo runs: The Olde Malthouse pub (Tintagel, Cornwall), a property company (7 properties),
and manages personal and family matters.

Classify into exactly one category:
  invoice | action-required | report-attachment | school-medical | property | pub | fyi | junk

Determine entity_id: 1=Trading (pub), 2=Estates (property), 3=Personal, 4=Family

Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No explanation.
Schema: {"category": string, "entity_id": number, "confidence_score": number (0-1), "summary": string (max 100 chars), "requires_human": boolean}", prompt: 'From: ' + $('Sanitise Email').first().json.from_address + '
Subject: ' + $('Sanitise Email').first().json.subject + '

' + $('Sanitise Email').first().json.body_text_safe, stream: false, format: 'json' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 256, system: "You are an email classification system for Jo, a business owner.
Jo runs: The Olde Malthouse pub (Tintagel, Cornwall), a property company (7 properties),
and manages personal and family matters.

Classify into exactly one category:
  invoice | action-required | report-attachment | school-medical | property | pub | fyi | junk

Determine entity_id: 1=Trading (pub), 2=Estates (property), 3=Personal, 4=Family

Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No explanation.
Schema: {"category": string, "entity_id": number, "confidence_score": number (0-1), "summary": string (max 100 chars), "requires_human": boolean}", messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'From: ' + $('Sanitise Email').first().json.from_address + '
Subject: ' + $('Sanitise Email').first().json.subject + '

' + $('Sanitise Email').first().json.body_text_safe }] }) }}

parameters.query:
SET LOCAL app.current_entity = '{{ $json.ai_entity_id }}';
INSERT INTO emails (
  gmail_message_id, account, from_address, from_name, subject,
  body_text, body_text_safe, received_at, classification, confidence_score,
  entity_id, has_attachment, requires_human, action_required, processed
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.sql_gmail_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_account }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_from_address }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_from_name }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_subject }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_body_text }}',
  '{{ $json.body_text_safe.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_received_at }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_category }}',
  {{ $json.ai_confidence }},
  {{ $json.ai_entity_id }},
  {{ !!$json.has_attachment }},
  {{ !!$json.ai_requires_human }},
  {{ $json.ai_category === 'action-required' }},
  false
) RETURNING id, trace_id;
RESET LOCAL app.current_entity;

SET LOCAL app.current_entity = '{{ $json.ai_entity_id }}';
INSERT INTO events (event_type, source, entity_id, payload, payload_signature,
                   trace_id, idempotency_key, status, pipeline_version)
SELECT 'email.received', 'gmail', {{ $json.ai_entity_id }},
       '{{ $json.rcvd_payload }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.rcvd_sig }}',
       '{{ $json.trace_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.idem_email }}',
       'processed', '1.0'
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
   SELECT 1 FROM events WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $json.idem_email }}'
 )
RETURNING id;

SET LOCAL app.current_entity = '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_entity_id }}';
INSERT INTO events (event_type, source, entity_id, payload, payload_signature,
                   trace_id, idempotency_key, status, pipeline_version)
SELECT 'email.classified', 'email_pipeline', {{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_entity_id }},
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.clsf_payload }}'::jsonb,
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.clsf_sig }}',
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.trace_id }}'::uuid,
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.idem_classified }}',
       'processed', '1.0'
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
   SELECT 1 FROM events WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.idem_classified }}'
 )
RETURNING id;

SET LOCAL app.current_entity = '{{ $("Sign Payloads").first().json.ai_entity_id }}';
INSERT INTO events (event_type, source, entity_id, payload, payload_signature,
                   trace_id, idempotency_key, status, pipeline_version,
                   parent_event_id)
SELECT 'invoice.detected', 'email_pipeline', {{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_entity_id }},
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.inv_payload }}'::jsonb,
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.inv_sig }}',
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.trace_id }}'::uuid,
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.idem_invoice }}',
       'pending', '1.0', NULL
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
   SELECT 1 FROM events WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.idem_invoice }}'
 );

SET LOCAL app.current_entity = '{{ $("Sign Payloads").first().json.ai_entity_id }}';
INSERT INTO audit_log (pipeline, action, entity_id, record_type, record_id,
                      ai_worker, ai_model, ai_raw_output, ai_parsed,
                      trace_id, pipeline_version, result)
VALUES ('email_pipeline', 'classify_email',
        {{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_entity_id }},
        'email', {{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.email_db_id }},
        '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_worker }}',
        '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_model }}',
        '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_raw_output.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.outcome_json }}'::jsonb, -- OUTCOME_PATCH_v1
        '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.trace_id }}'::uuid,
        '1.0', 'success');

SET LOCAL app.current_entity = '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_entity_id }}';
-- Emit child.event.detected only when classifier marked it school-medical.
INSERT INTO events
  (event_type, source, entity_id, payload, payload_signature,
   trace_id, idempotency_key, status, pipeline_version)
SELECT 'child.event.detected',
       'email_pipeline',
       {{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_entity_id }},
       $pl${{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.child_payload }}$pl$::jsonb,
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.child_sig }}',
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.trace_id }}'::uuid,
       '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.idem_child }}',
       'pending', '1.0'
 WHERE '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.ai_category }}' = 'school-medical'
   AND NOT EXISTS (
     SELECT 1 FROM events
      WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $('Sign Payloads').first().json.idem_child }}'
   )
RETURNING id;
